title: ononis spinosa var. hirsuta
intro: Ononis spinosa var. hirsuta, also known as hairy restharrow, is a plant species within the Ononis genus of legumes. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of hairy restharrow include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of hairy restharrow can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
